`` must include an `alt` attribute (empty string is OK for decorative images).
`<a>` must have a meaningful `href` for navigation.
Avoid empty `href`, `href="#"`, or `javascript:` URLs without accessible behavior.
`console.warn(...)` left in source — remove before shipping or gate behind dev-only checks.
`console.error(...)` left in source — remove or route through logging.
Empty `catch` block swallows errors — log, rethrow, or handle intentionally.
`debugger` statement should not ship to production.
